# Redowan's Reflections

> Personal blog by Redowan Delowar about software engineering, distributed systems, Go, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, and systems design.

Canonical site: https://rednafi.com

## Key pages

- Home: https://rednafi.com/
- About: https://rednafi.com/about/
- Archive: https://rednafi.com/archive/
- Tags: https://rednafi.com/tags/
- Search: https://rednafi.com/search/

## Sections

- Go: https://rednafi.com/go/
- Python: https://rednafi.com/python/
- JavaScript: https://rednafi.com/javascript/
- TypeScript: https://rednafi.com/typescript/
- Systems: https://rednafi.com/system/
- Miscellaneous: https://rednafi.com/misc/
- Zephyr: https://rednafi.com/zephyr/
- Shards / notes: https://rednafi.com/shards/

## Feeds and indexes

- Sitemap: https://rednafi.com/sitemap.xml
- Main RSS: https://rednafi.com/index.xml
- Articles feed: https://rednafi.com/articles.xml

## Access guidance

- Prefer canonical `https://rednafi.com` URLs.
- Use the archive, tags page, section indexes, or sitemap to discover content.
- A Markdown representation is available by requesting HTML pages with `Accept: text/markdown`.
